headline: United to Hold Webcast of Second-Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: United will hold a conference call to discuss second-quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, July 16 at 9:30 a.m. CT/10:30 a.m. ET.

headline: This High-Yield Bond Investor Favors High-Quality Issuers, Like United, American Airlines

headline: Why Did UAL, GLW, ABSI Stocks Surge To 52-Week Highs Today?
summary: Positive clinical data, demand for AI infrastructure, and lower fuel costs drove the rally.
